data.content: Implemented conversation-log readability pass on branch work/foolery-c355-impl-20260321. Updated src/components/agent-history-view.tsx and src/components/interaction-picker.tsx to raise conversation-log typography by one step, increase header/card surface contrast, and brighten secondary metadata text for better legibility on dark backgrounds. Validation: bun run lint (pre-existing warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Commit: fcba1f7d06f7.
